whiteboard: flowchart LR HOME["首页 产品介绍"] --> WS["/workspace 对话式工作台"] HOME --> RL["/release 批次放行闸门"] HOME --> Q["/queue 核验队列"] HOME --> IMP["/import CSV采集箱"] HOME --> ST["/settings provider设置"] WS -. "选prompt或输入指令" .-> WS2["字段映射 修复patch 同品归并 流程任务"] RL --> Scan["一键扫描整批"] Scan --> Res["/result 结果"] Res --> Rep["/replay 回放"] Res --> App["/approval 人审"] Res --> Prf["/proof 凭证"]
